title: Pearl Indicators
description: Tells you when a player pearls and in which direction!
body:
**Tells you when a player pearls! Also tells you who and in which direction!**
Default bind is "H" to swap Indication types!

![Pearl Notification](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0934b06d3cb73f30b9ca77fa9f04718fc9bb8c1a.png)
![Pearl Indicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dbbe45f6cd4b935ea13b81376ed7a743de8a32f.png)
